title: ProDec 5" Flat Masonry Paint Brush for Rapid Application of Smooth or Textured Masonry Paints, Multicolor, 5"
features: Trade quality brush suitable for all types of masonry paint including water-based smooth or textured, as well as solvent (white spirit)-based
5(125mm) width for high capacity paint holding, rapid application and coverage
Blend of hardwearing pure grey bristle and synthetic filaments combining performance and durability
Bristle length and density tailored for masonry application to enable it to effectively reach into textured surfaces including brick, breeze block, render and pebbledash
Heavy duty plastic handle with hanging hole for easy storage and drying
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Painting textured surfaces made easier Tackle demanding masonry and heavily textured surfaces with this trade quality flat masonry brush, with a wide head for rapid coverage. Ideal for all types of masonry paint including water-based smooth or textured, as well as solvent (white spirit)-based, it features long bristles that hold plenty of paint so you're not constantly have to reload it - important especially if you're working off the ground on a ladder or platform. The brush head is a blend of pure grey bristle and synthetic filaments that combine optimum paint loading with the durability that's essential for the heavy duty demands of masonry surfaces. The density of the bristle is carefully tailored for masonry application, enabling it to get right into textured surfaces including brick, breeze block, render, stucco (exterior cement plaster) and pebbledash and effectively apply paint without splaying at the tip. The heavy duty handle has a hanging hole for storage, which is also a great way to dry the brush after washing and let gravity do the work, helping it maintain its shape ready for next use. The brush should be cleaned with water or white spirit, depending on the type of paint it has been used with. Note that it is not suitable for use with high viscosity or industrial type coatings. Solutions for painting masonry from ProDec ProDec has a range of tools to make painting masonry easier, so whether the surface is a lightly textured render or a demanding pebbledash, we've got everything you need to do the job right. Preparation brushes There are few other surfaces where preparation before painting is as critical as it is for masonry. ProDec has a range of wire and stiff fibre hand brushes to help remove dirt, grime, algae and more to ensure optimum paint adhesion and give a long lasting finish. Paint rollers Made using durable fabrics that stand up to the demands of rough surfaces, ProDec has a range of longer pile rollers that hold plenty of paint and are effective at getting into surface textures for rapid application without missing areas. As well as standard cage rollers, a range of ultra heavy duty padded rollers is also available. Paint brushes ProDec has flat brushes and block brushes that are tailored to masonry surfaces and deliver paint right into even heavy textures for fast, efficient coverage. Extension poles Working off the ground and above head height means you're less mobile, so efficiency is key. Using an extension pole greatly increases your reach and ProDec has rugged, trade quality poles than can withstand heavy duty use with even the biggest rollers and on the roughest surfaces. Paint scuttles Scuttles hold much more paint than trays, meaning that you don't have to regularly reload them and enabling you to work more quickly and efficiently. ProDec scuttles feature a robust construction and a low centre of gravity when full of paint, so they're not easily knocked over. Telescopic ladders Robust yet lightweight, ProDec's telescopic ladders extend to a range of heights for maximum flexibility. They are loaded with features to keep you safe, including 150kg load bearing capacity, soft close rung collapse mechanism and rubber footers for maximum stability. Work platforms Lightweight and portable, our range of aluminium platforms extend your reach vertically and gives increased left to right reach compared to stepladders. They fold down to a compact size quickly and easily for transport and storage. Swivel pot hook A simple yet incredibly useful tool that safely grips paint cans and kettles up to 5 litres, with a universal hook that enables it to be securely attached to ladders and scaffolding for easy hands free access.
